project_privacy_data_flows.description: The user enters a server URL during onboarding, completes OAuth2 authentication, and the app securely stores the obtained Bearer Token and Refresh Token in EncryptedSharedPreferences.

flow_steps.details: User enters the Home Assistant server URL and initiates the authentication flow.

flow_steps.code: suspend fun exchangeCodeForToken(code: String): AuthPayload { httpClient.post(authUrl, code) }
flow_steps.details: The authorization code is exchanged for a Bearer Token via HTTPS POST to the Home Assistant server's token endpoint.

flow_steps.code: suspend fun storeToken(authPayload: AuthPayload) { encryptedPreferences.putString("access_token", authPayload.accessToken); putString("refresh_token", authPayload.refreshToken) }
flow_steps.details: The Bearer Token and Refresh Token are securely stored using EncryptedSharedPreferences (AES-256 encryption).
